content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(6, 9, 6), (4, 6, 7), (1, 6, 10), (6, 8, 11), (0, 3, 13), (1, 8, 13), (4, 7, 13), (0, 5, 15), (3, 7, 16), (0, 1, 19), (1, 4, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 4 exactly at time 19.

First, we will go through each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (6, 9, 6) has node 6 and time 6. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 6, 7) has node 4 and time 7. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 6, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (6, 8, 11) has node 6 and time 11. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 3, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 8, 13) has node 1 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 7, 13) has node 4 and time 13. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 5, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 7, 16) has node 3 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 1, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (1, 4, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 4.

Now we have the following nodes linked with node 4 at time 19: 6, 8, 11, 3, 7, 5, 1, 4.

Answer: [6, 8, 11, 3, 7, 5, 1, 4]
